title: Mace Smp
description: 10 Custom  Maces  with op abilties u  can have fun and play  with ur friends
body:
Mace Smp
10 maces.Mace Ruins is a hardcore SMP weapon plugin built around psychological warfare, terrain control, and high-risk combat mechanics  op skill based  maces 

Features

10 unique maces with deep passive and active mechanics
Cooldown-balanced abilities built for SMP PvP
Clean GUI accessible with a single command
No dependencies — fully self-contained
good config  folder to edit  wtv u want

Commands & Permissions
/macesmp Opens the Mace Ruins selection GUI 
/macesmp info lets any member on your server see  the  maces
/macesmp reload (reload whatever u  changed in config)
/macesmp give

The GUI displays all 10 maces. Click any mace to receive it directly in your inventory. Items cannot be moved within the GUI.
